_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: S462-TY MPNST cells show limited sensitivity to MEK inhibition. At 24 hours, 125 µmol/L selumetinib alone results in ∼65% of the cells showing an accumulation in the S-phase
details: S462-TY cells showed limited sensitivity to MEK inhibition, with 125 μmol/L selumetinib resulting in ~65% cells in S-phase at 24 hours
